creator: break19@gmail.com
text:
It's also a bit out of date.

1.52 is released and wants electron 6 rather than 5.

it also can be compiled with python 3.x on linux at least. my opensuse box has it built with python3.8 for example.

however, the code seems to be full of linuxisms and will likely require many patches to build here. It's a shame, as it's my favorite IDE.
